title: AI-Powered Reporting Engine
challenge: Client reports were taking 3+ hours per month per client, bottlenecking growth.
solution: Built a custom LLM-integrated engine that automatically gathers data and generates strategic insights.

title: Global Digital Infrastructure
challenge: Legacy systems were causing significant downtime and slow page speeds across 50+ regions.
solution: Architected a headless CMS with an edge-cached CDN strategy and performance-first frontend.
